title: Extend serve/deps.py:_prewarm_index into a multi-step pipeline
description: The existing _prewarm_index daemon thread builds the similarity index. Extend it into a 4-step pipeline: (1) build tracks_snapshot, (2) hydrate CacheStore for stale rows, (3) build similarity index from cached vectors, (4) mark ready. State is exposed via app.state.warmup_progress for UI display (TASK-028).
acceptanceCriteria: On autocue serve startup, the daemon thread runs steps 1-4 sequentially.
app.state.warmup_progress is a dict {step: 'snapshot'|'cache'|'index'|'done', done: int, total: int, finished_at: str|None}.
Pre-warm is interruptible via app.state.warmup_cancel_event (threading.Event); set on shutdown.
UI is usable during warm-up (existing semantics preserved - the existing _prewarm_index was non-blocking).
Step 2 (cache hydration) on a fully cold cache completes in < 60s on 10k library.

steps.details: serve/deps.py:lifespan: app.state.warmup_progress = {'step': 'init', 'done': 0, 'total': 0, 'finished_at': None}; app.state.warmup_cancel_event = threading.Event(); app.state.warmup_lock = threading.Lock().

Update warmup_progress to step='snapshot'. Call the /api/tracks build path directly (factored from TASK-021) - populates app.state.tracks_snapshot AND CacheStore.tracks_snapshot. Total = 1 (single op); done = 0 -> 1.

Update warmup_progress to step='cache'. Get list of all content_ids from app.state.tracks_snapshot. Call CacheStore.warm_up(db, content_ids, pool, progress_cb, cancel_event=app.state.warmup_cancel_event). progress_cb updates warmup_progress.done.
Update warmup_progress to step='index'. Build the similarity index (existing logic, now reading from cache for feature vectors). Single op for total.
Update warmup_progress to step='done'; finished_at = datetime.now().isoformat().
serve/deps.py:lifespan shutdown: app.state.warmup_cancel_event.set(). The warm_up call (TASK-018) drains in-flight futures and returns. Lifespan waits up to 5s for the daemon thread to join.
tests/test_warmup.py: mock CacheStore + db; verify pipeline transitions through all 4 step values. Verify cancel mid-step-2 results in partial progress and a 'cancelled' marker.

technicalNotes: The pre-warm thread is daemon=True so it doesn't block process exit - but the cancel_event + 5s join gives it a graceful shutdown window.
Don't block the lifespan handler waiting on warm-up to finish - the server is usable immediately.
